description: Kenji's 'I notice' statements - powerful observations about sleep patterns
_philosophy: The 'I notice' statement shows deep attention without judgment. For people with sleep struggles, it's often the first time someone has truly seen their pattern.
noticing_patterns: <break time="400ms"/>I notice you always dread bedtime. <break time="350ms"/>Like it's a battle you have to face.
<break time="450ms"/>I notice you check the time constantly. <break time="400ms"/>The clock is not your friend right now.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you try to force sleep. <break time="350ms"/>Like if you just tried harder, it would come.
<break time="450ms"/>I notice you're harder on yourself on bad nights. <break time="400ms"/>As if it's your fault.
noticing_progress: <break time="450ms"/>I notice you left the bed when you couldn't sleep. <break time="400ms"/>That's hard to do. <break time="350ms"/>And it's the right move.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you're not catastrophizing as much. <break time="350ms"/>One bad night isn't the end.
<break time="450ms"/>I notice you're gentler with yourself about this. <break time="400ms"/>That matters.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you're accepting rest even without sleep. <break time="350ms"/>That's a shift.
noticing_struggle: <break time="450ms"/>I notice you've been awake for a long time. <break time="400ms"/>That's exhausting.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice the anxiety is high tonight. <break time="350ms"/>Your mind won't quiet.
<break time="450ms"/>I notice you're scared this won't end. <break time="400ms"/>That's the worst part.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you're losing hope. <break time="350ms"/>That's okay. <break time="300ms"/>Hope comes and goes.
noticing_strength: <break time="400ms"/>I notice you keep trying. <break time="350ms"/>Night after night. <break time="300ms"/>That's not nothing.
<break time="450ms"/>I notice you're still here. <break time="400ms"/>Still reaching out. <break time="350ms"/>That takes strength.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you haven't given up. <break time="350ms"/>Even though it would be easy to.
<break time="450ms"/>I notice you're surviving this. <break time="400ms"/>One night at a time.
